default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss SEO strategies and the use of AI for content creation and optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Importance of playing the long game with organic search and building a subscriber base](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Using AI to analyze and compare different language models for specific use cases](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Leveraging human-in-the-loop approaches with AI to improve content quality and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Exploring different hiring models (agencies, freelancers) for writers and AI-assisted content production](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

## Topics

### Organic Search and Subscriber Growth

  - [The long-term value of organic search traffic and building an audience](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Examples of companies with massive organic traffic (HubSpot, Salesforce)](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Strategies for content creation, optimization, and subscriber conversion](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Analyzing and Comparing Language Models

  - [Collecting data on model performance, quality scores, costs etc.](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Using AI to analyze and summarize differences between model outputs for the same prompts](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Identifying optimal models for specific use cases based on quality, cost, speed etc.](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)

### Human-in-the-Loop Content Workflows

  - [Incorporating human input at key stages (title selection, outline review, quality checks)](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Training writers/editors on prompt engineering and AI-assisted content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Potential to leverage technical experts for final reviews/enhancements](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Hiring Models for AI-Assisted Content

  - [Exploring agencies that provide trained writers familiar with AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Upskilling existing writers/editors on AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Balancing quality, cost, and scalability with different hiring approaches](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Share any "aha moments" or learnings from AI content experiments](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [Explore potential collaboration opportunities around AI-driven content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [Continue iterating on human-in-the-loop workflows and hiring models](https://fathom.video/share/Ujq7qqZMd2M_U9rCJhEwzGRxJCKdCVWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)

action_items.description: Provide details on full-time writers and content creation process including hiring process, training, workflows, and quality control
